name: Absorption Gauntlet
description:
Built by a Cannith Artificer to help make explosive disasters a lot less of
a health hazard.
dropLocation: Taken in Hand, End chest

name: Admiral's Gloves
description:
A crisp fold in the corner of these starched white gloves gives them a regal,
official air.
dropLocation: Isle of Dread (wilderness), rare encounter chests

name: Alaric's Grim Gauntlets
description: The fingertips of these gloves have been dipped in blood.
dropLocation: Skeletons in the Closet, Free Yarrow optional chest

name: Arcane Gloves
description: These leather gloves have small arcane sigils burned into them.
dropLocation: Necromancer's Doom, Chest behind locked door

name: Attunement Gauntlets
description: Are these... glowing?
dropLocation: The Same Old Song, End chest

name: Backstabber's Gloves (historic)
description:
These leather gloves were once worn by Vrall the Fearless of the Cloven-Jaw.
They are soaked with the blood of his enemies... or perhaps his allies.
dropLocation: The Crucible, Vrall 's chest

name: Backstabber's Gloves (Level 12)
description:
These leather gloves were once worn by Vrall the Fearless of the Cloven-Jaw.

description: These gloves are patterned to look like the bark of a birch tree.

name: Blademaster Gauntlets
description: These gauntlets are crafted for powerful hobgoblin warriors known as Blademasters.
dropLocation: Assault on Splinterskull, End reward

name: Blood-Stained Doctor's Gloves
description: These delacate gloves are covered in blood, although whose blood cannot be said.
dropLocation: Body and Mind, end chest

name: Blooming Gauntlets
dropLocation: Toil and Trouble, end chest

name: Bluescale Guides
description:
On the hands of a capable spellcaster, these fingerless scale gloves augment
magic as it flows through them.
dropLocation: Riding the Storm Out, Warded chest

name: Blurfingered Gloves
description: It's not about who casts the best, it's about who casts the fastest.
dropLocation: Into the Mists, End Chest

name: Bramble-Casters
description:
Created by some wizard to aid in outdoor pursuits, these gloves seem to deflect
oncoming barbs, thorns and other sharp objects.
dropLocation: Zawabi's Revenge, Raid Warded chest

name: Brawling Gloves (legacy) (level 12)
description:
Some pirates prefer to brawl with their bare hands. These strength-enhancing
gloves are perfect for their fighting style.
dropLocation: Treasure of Crystal Cove, Turn in at Dusty Old Treasure of Crystal Cove

name: Brawling Gloves (legacy) (level 16)
description:
Some pirates prefer to brawl with their bare hands. These strength-enhancing
gloves are perfect for their fighting style.

name: Cannith Crafted Gloves
description: This is a Cannith crafted pair of gloves.

name: Cardinal's Gloves
description:
These fine gloves are incredibly soft to the touch. Unfortunately, they do not
appear particularly resistant to harm.
dropLocation: Endgame: The Archbishop's Fate, End chest

name: Cesti
description:
Made to be worn on each hand, the cestus aids in unarmed combat by covering
the wearer's knuckle with metal studs.
dropLocation: Cult of the Six, End reward

name: Charged Gauntlets
description: These gloves channel powerful electric energy into enemies that you strike.
dropLocation: The Chronoscope, End reward

name: Cinderfingers
description:
Sparks of flame dance between the fingertips of these heavy leather gloves.
They're perfect for burning away Webs.
dropLocation: What Sleeps Below, end chest

name: Clarissa's Lace Gloves
description: Why would Clarissa have gloves like these? Curious.
dropLocation: Eye Know Whodunnit, End chest

name: Claws of the Coldlight Walker
description:
Sharper than they appear, these gloves fell from the form of a fallen Coldlight
Walker.
dropLocation: A Light in the Attic, end chest

name: Cloth Half-Sleeve
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Control Gauntlet
description: A modified version of an Absorption Gauntlet, meant to aid in the magic of control.
dropLocation: Taken in Hand, End chest

name: Creation Forge Gauntlets
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Crumbling Gloves
dropLocation: Oath of Vengeance, end chest

name: Crystal-Lined Magegloves
description:
The temple's leaders favor these types of gloves, as they focus their twisted
magic as it slithers from their outstretched fingers.
dropLocation: ToEE: First Level and Earth Temple, end chest

name: Crystalline Gauntlets
description: These are made of cut and polished gemstones, and hum with primal magics.
dropLocation: Too Hot to Handle, end chest

name: Darstil's Gloves
description:
The gloves of Darstil Vurusk, Grand Arcanist of the Night Brigade, intricately
sewn to allow the free flow of spellcasting.
dropLocation: The Wizard's Labyrinth, end chest

name: Dashing Gloves
description:
A pair of fingerless leather gloves in the style most often worn by travelling
minstrels.
dropLocation: Good Intentions, End chest

name: Deadringers
description: These gloves smell of dead autumn leaves.
dropLocation: Make Believe, End chest

name: Delicate Thimbletips
description: Enchanted and very fragile, these thimbles are made of delicate glass.
dropLocation: Soul Survivor, end chest

name: Dinosaur Bone Gloves
description: Fashioned of intricately carved bones of long-forgotten Dinosaurs.
dropLocation: The Isle of Dread, any legendary chest; or Dread saga legendary end reward

name: Duskpalm
description: These gloves only cover the palms, not your fingers.
dropLocation: Violent Delights, end chest

name: Elise's Grasp
description: Reach out for the truth, and perhaps you can take it for your own.
dropLocation: Snowfall and Sunlight, end chest

name: Epic Blooming Gauntlets
dropLocation: Toil and Trouble, end chest

name: Epic Gloves of the Claw
description:
Drow warriors don these gloves before combat and are granted great power in
battle. They claim the gloves are infused with Vulkoor's wrath.

name: Epic Gloves of the Falcon
description:
Leather gloves modeled after a falconer's gloves. These gloves give the wearer
dramatically increased visual acuity as well as increased dexterity.

description: Nimble hands make light work.

name: Epic Linen Wraps
description:
Filthy bandages that smell of gravedust and mildew. When worn, the wraps seem
to enhance the strength of the wearer.
dropLocation: Thrall of the Necromancer, End chest

name: Epic Raven's Talons
description:
Gloves like these make the wearer's attacks more precise and are often employed
by drow scouts and spies.
dropLocation: Epic version of Raven's Talons

name: Epic Ruby Encrusted Gauntlets
description: These ruby-encrusted gauntlets shine with a feverish glow.
dropLocation: Epic version of Ruby Encrusted Gauntlets

name: Epic Spectral Gloves
description: These gloves have an ethereal quality to them.
dropLocation: Epic version of Spectral Gloves

name: Fabricator's Gauntlets
description:
Fabricators of House Cannith wear bulky gauntlets like these to increase their
manual strength and their ability to work with raw materials.
dropLocation: House Cannith Manufactury, Wrack 's chest (Rare encounter)

name: Faded Tracker's Gloves
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Fanged Gloves
description: Vampire fangs are imbedded between the knuckles of these gloves.
dropLocation: Litany of the Dead, High Priest of Vol 's chest

name: Fingerless Gloves
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Fists of Justice
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Furyform Gauntlets
description: Rage against the tide.
dropLocation: The Hobgoblin Horde, End chest

name: Gauntlet of the Iron Council
description:
Forged for the Arbiter of the Iron Council, Torlan Mroranon, this heavy gauntlet
can protect you from harmful spells.
dropLocation: Project Nemesis, end chest; Masterminds of Sharn saga: Epic end reward; rare drop in any legendary Sharn quest

name: Gauntlets of Eternity
description:
After their forging, each plate in these complex gauntlets was quenched in a
fountain of life-giving elixir. Perhaps this helped preserve the gauntlets
themselves, long after most of the Lost Empire's handiwork crumbled to dust.
dropLocation: The Reaver's Fate, Warded Chest

name: Gauntlets of Immortality
description:
After their forging, each plate in these complex gauntlets was quenched in a
fountain of life-giving elixir. Perhaps this helped preserve the gauntlets
themselves, long after most of the Lost Empire's handiwork crumbled to dust.
dropLocation: The Fall of Truth, Raid warded chest (Epic Normal)

name: Gauntlets of Innate Arcanum
description:
Though appearing as simple gauntlets, on the right hands these gloves act as
a conduit for magic.
dropLocation: Sunrise, End chest, Abbot chest

name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
description: Steel reinforced gauntlets.
dropLocation: Random, Any chest with loot level ~11-17

name: Gauntlets of the Aggressor
description:
Once the posession of a notable Dragonborn warlord, these Gauntlets curiously
change to fit the hands of their bearer.
dropLocation: Riding the Storm Out, Warded chest

name: Gauntlets of the Arcane Soldier
description: These heavy gloves draw in arcane energy from wherever they can find it.
dropLocation: Defiler of the Just, Warded chest

name: Gauntlets of the Stormreaver
description:
These heavy gauntlets are inscribed with lightning, and seem to resonate while
in your hands.
dropLocation: Killing Time, warded chest

name: Gilded Gloves of Sanctity
description:
These gloves contain threads wound of pure gold, and contain healing energies
unlike any you've ever encountered.
dropLocation: The Lost Gatekeepers, Any chest

name: Gloryborne Gloves
description:
FEYTWISTED form of Legendary Deadringers 

These gloves smell of vibrant autumn leaves.
dropLocation: The Feywild, Feytwisted chests

name: Gloves of Deceit
description:
Used by Gnashtooth Kobolds when they come up to the surface to steal trinkets,
these gloves contain tiny pockets that disperse a small cloud of distracting
dust.
dropLocation: The Lost Seekers, End reward

name: Gloves of Dexterity
description: Sleek moleskin gloves.
dropLocation: Random, level ~4 chests/rewards

name: Gloves of Forgotten Craft (historic)
description:
These gloves were sewn for the artisan slaves of the Lost Empire. The giants
found that such enchanted tools enabled the nimble elves to manufacture wonders.
dropLocation: Gianthold Tor, White Dragon 's chest

name: Gloves of Gnoll Hide
description:
These gloves have a soft, tender feel to them; you hardly realize they're made

name: Gloves of the Claw
description:
Drow warriors don these gloves before combat and are granted great power in
battle. They claim the gloves are infused with Vulkoor's wrath.

name: Gloves of the Falcon
description:
Leather gloves modeled after a falconer's gloves. These gloves give the wearer
dramatically increased visual acuity as well as increased dexterity.
dropLocation:
Sands of Menechtarun, Firebrand Area: Lieutenant Ayurro 's chest (Rare Encounter); 
 Masei Mkembe sells for 625 Antique Bronze Tokens

name: Gloves of the Glacier
description:
Crafted by the great wizard Telios, these gloves are said to have been crafted
from the flesh of Frost Giants. Telios disappeared recently, after being asked
by members of the twelve to investigate the ruins beneath Stormreach. There
is said to be a matching pair of bracers to these gloves.
dropLocation: A Vision of Destruction, End chest

name: Gloves of the Graverobber
description: These grant a good grip, whether that be on shovel, coffin, or cadaver.
dropLocation: The Body Snatchers, end chest

name: Gloves of the Master Illusionist (Level 17)
description:
Perception is as good as reality.
-Motto of the Thultanthar Academy of the Illusionary Arts
dropLocation: A Break In the Ice, End chest (Heroic Normal); The Secret of the Storm Horns, quest chain end reward (Heroic)

description: Nimble fingers make light work of the intricate blades the Elves once crafted.

description:
A famous Stormreach bard offered these flashy gloves to the one who defeats
Hetman Shaagh .
dropLocation: The Seal of Shan-To-Kor, End reward

name: Gloves of the Resilient
description:
Light enough to not impede movement, but somehow sturdy enough to stop a blade,
these gloves have seen their share of conflict.

name: Gloves of the Scoundrel
description: These fine leather gloves must have belonged to someone else before you.

name: Legendary Delicate Thimbletips
description: Enchanted and very fragile, these thimbles are made of delicate glass.
dropLocation: Soul Survivor, end chest

name: Legendary Elise's Grasp
description: Reach out for the truth, and perhaps you can take it for your own.
dropLocation: Snowfall and Sunlight, end chest

name: Legendary Fabricator's Gauntlets
description:
Fabricators of House Cannith wear bulky gauntlets like these to increase their
manual strength and their ability to work with raw materials.
dropLocation: Legendary Master Artificer, End and optional chest

name: Legendary Gauntlets of Innate Arcanum
description:
Though appearing as simple gauntlets, on the right hands these gloves act as
a conduit for magic.
dropLocation: Sunrise, End chest, Abbot chest

name: Legendary Gloves of the Claw
description:
Drow warriors don these gloves before combat and are granted great power in
battle. They claim the gloves are infused with Vulkoor's wrath.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Gloves of the Claw

name: Legendary Gloves of the Falcon
description:
Leather gloves modeled after a falconer's gloves. These gloves give the wearer
dramatically increased visual acuity as well as increased dexterity.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Gloves of the Falcon

name: Legendary Gloves of the Glacier
description:
Crafted by the great wizard Telios, these gloves are said to have been crafted
from the flesh of Frost Giants. Telios disappeared recently, after being asked
by members of the twelve to investigate the ruins beneath Stormreach. There
is said to be a matching pair of bracers to these gloves.
dropLocation: Legendary Vision of Destruction, End chest

name: Legendary Gloves of the Graverobber
description: These grant a good grip, whether that be on shovel, coffin, or cadaver.
dropLocation: The Body Snatchers, end chest

name: Legendary Gloves of the Nimble
description: Nimble fingers make light work of the intricate blades the Elves once crafted.
dropLocation: Death Hosts This Banquet, end chest

name: Legendary Gloves of the Resilient
description:
Light enough to not impede movement, but somehow sturdy enough to stop a blade,
these gloves have seen their share of conflict.
dropLocation: The Safehold, end chest

name: Legendary Gloves of the Strong
description: Made of simple cloth, great strength lies in wait for those willing to use it.
dropLocation: The House of Gems, end chest

name: Legendary Gloves of the Tinkerer
description: Nimble hands make light work.
dropLocation: Saltmarsh, rare encounter chests, or Legendary version of Epic Gloves of the Tinkerer

name: Legendary Gloves of Tranquility
description: Peace fills your mind when you channel magic through these gloves.
dropLocation: The Icemount Curse, End chest

name: Legendary Green Steel Weave Gloves
description: Gloves crafted from cloth woven with threads of green steel.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Greenpine Gauntlets
description: These gloves are patterned to look like the bark of a pine tree.
dropLocation: The Curse and the Captive Crustacean, end chest

name: Legendary Grick-skin Gauntlets
description: The skin forming these gauntlets looks like rock - Tiny barbs line the knuckles.
dropLocation: Zoo Creeper, end chest

name: Legendary Hammerfist
description: Come for the hammer, stay for the fist.
dropLocation: Blown Deadline, end chest

name: Legendary Hands of House Jorasco
description:
Healing is a noble art, but the sight of the sick and dying have a way of sticking
in one's memories...
dropLocation: Quarantine, End Chest

name: Legendary Hands of Waste
dropLocation: The Covered Culvert, end chest

name: Legendary Intricate Magegloves
description:
The temple's leaders favor these types of gloves, as they focus their twisted
magic as it slithers from their outstretched fingers.
dropLocation: ToEE: First Level and Earth Temple, end chest

name: Legendary Jetscale Gauntlets
description:
The dragonscales along the back of these gauntlets protect the hands from both
magical and mundane corrosion.
dropLocation: Wish Upon a Card, end chest

name: Legendary Knifepalm
description: This single leather glove has a slot where a simple knife can be hidden.
dropLocation: The Final Vintage, End chest

name: Legendary Liar's Fingers
description: If the tongue of a lair is effective, then their hands can make light work.
dropLocation: Catastrophe, End chest

name: Legendary Lizardfolk Gloves of Accuracy
description:
This pair of gloves has notches along the edges that supposedly assist with
aiming.
dropLocation: The Newcomers, end chest

name: Legendary Maenya's Fists
description:
A pair of gloves said to have been originally crafted for the hag queen Sora
Maenya. They bestow the wearer with fearsome strength and the ability to terrorize
foes.
dropLocation: Eyes of Stone, end chest

name: Legendary Maenya's Iron Fists
description:
This pair of gloves, said to have been originally crafted for the hag queen
Sora Maenya, have been upgraded. They bestow the wearer with fearsome strength
and the ability to terrorize foes.
dropLocation: Cauldron of Sora Katra, upgraded version of Legendary Maenya's Fists

name: Legendary Mastermaker's Fingers
description: NEW and IMPROVED: Now with built-in set of wrenches!
dropLocation: Just Business, End Chest

name: Legendary Raven's Talons
description:
Gloves like these make the wearer's attacks more precise and are often employed
by drow scouts and spies.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Raven's Talons

name: Legendary Ruby Encrusted Gauntlets
description: These ruby-encrusted gauntlets shine with a feverish glow.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Ruby Encrusted Gauntlets

name: Legendary Skin-tight Gloves
description: You do not know what these are made of, but you can take a few horrifying guesses
dropLocation: The Offshore Account, end chest

name: Legendary Spectral Gloves
description: These gloves have an ethereal quality to them.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Spectral Gloves

name: Legendary Stone-forged Gauntlet
description: A large, simple stone appears to be central to the contruction of this gauntlet.
dropLocation: Housekeeping, End chest

name: Legendary Sunstone Gauntlets
description: This... This is a pair of gloves tied to a rock.
dropLocation: Best Laid Plans, end chest

name: Legendary The Dark Six-Fingered Glove
description:
A finger for each of the Dark Six. While worn, the sixth finger moves where
you will it as if it were part of your hand. It feels wrong.
dropLocation: The Evil We Know, End chest

name: Legendary Tinkerer's Gloves
description:
Gloves worn by House Cannith tinkers to grant them greater dexterity and aid
them in working with complex devices.
dropLocation: Legendary Lord of Blades, End and optional chest

name: Legendary Wildwood Gauntlets
description: Crafted of intricately placed twigs grown together into a cohesive whole.
dropLocation: Reach for the Sky, end chest

name: Legendary Wondrous Magegloves
description:
The temple's leaders favor these types of gloves, as they focus their twisted
magic as it slithers from their outstretched fingers.
dropLocation:
ToEE: Lower Temple Complex, end chest
ToEE: Earth Node, end chest

description: If the tongue of a lair is effective, then their hands can make light work.
dropLocation: Catastrophe, end chest

name: Linen Handwraps
description:
Filthy bandages that smell of gravedust and mildew. When worn, the wraps seem
to enhance the strength of the wearer.
dropLocation: Delera's Tomb, End reward

name: Linen Wraps
description:
Filthy bandages that smell of gravedust and mildew. When worn, the wraps seem
to enhance the strength of the wearer.

name: Magmatic Grasp
description: Crush them with your fists.
dropLocation: Fables of the Feywild, any chest

name: Mastermaker's Fingers
description: NEW and IMPROVED: Now with built-in set of wrenches!
dropLocation: Just Business, End Chest

name: Masterwork Gauntlet
description:
This gauntlet is fabricated in a way to grant great skill while not hampering
the fine dexterity of the user.
dropLocation: Fire Over Morgrave, end chest

name: Molb's Fist
description:
This pair of gloves are cold to the touch and once belonged to Molb, a powerful
water savant.
dropLocation: The Gate Chamber, End chest

name: Molten Adamantine Gauntlets
description: These drip molten adamantine. Do not eat.
dropLocation: Project Nemesis, Raid Chest

name: Molten Silver Gauntlets
description:
These silver gauntlets are partially melted, and envelop your hands and weapons.
Do not eat.
dropLocation: Old Baba's Hut, Raid Chest

name: Nether Grasps (Level 16)
description: Somehow, the smoky leather of these gloves is never lit by direct sunlight.
dropLocation: The End of the Road, End chest (Heroic Normal)

name: Nether Grasps (Level 17)
description: Somehow, the smoky leather of these gloves is never lit by direct sunlight.
dropLocation: The End of the Road, End chest (Heroic Hard)

dropLocation: The End of the Road, End chest (Epic Normal), Netherese Legacy chain end reward

name: Nimble Grasp
description: These gloves are said to allow the wielder to move more swiftly.
dropLocation: Sacrifices, End reward

name: Perfected Charged Gauntlets
description: These gloves channel powerful electric energy into enemies that you strike.
dropLocation: Lahar, Turn in Nebula Fragment

name: Perfected Cinderfingers
description: Sparks of flame dance between the fingertips of these heavy leather gloves.
dropLocation: Lahar, Turn in Nebula Fragment

name: Protective Gloves
description: These gloves will cast a protective shield when their magic is called upon.
dropLocation: Necromancer's Doom, Chest behind locked door

name: Protector's Gloves
description: This pair of gloves is said to protect those who would protect others.
dropLocation: Sacrifices, End reward

name: Purple Dragon Gauntlets
description:
These gauntlets are of the same make as those worn by the famed Purple Dragon
Knights of Cormyr.
dropLocation: Eveningstar, Turn in 5 Commendations: Purple Dragon Knights Commendation: Purple Dragon Knights : This is a valuable item that can be exchanged for goods if brought to a Challenge Trader. This is a token of favor earned by helping the Purple Dragon Knights. You can exchange it in Eveningstar for powerful equipment.

name: Rabbit Gloves
description:
Luxurious gloves that keep out the cold and give their wearer a dose of good
luck. Better luck than the rabbit's, you hope.
dropLocation: The Abandoned Excavation, End reward

name: Raven's Talons
description:
Gloves like these make the wearer's attacks more precise and are often employed
by drow scouts and spies.
dropLocation: Into the Deep, End reward

name: Restorative Gloves
description: These gloves give bonuses to healing and repair skills.
dropLocation: Redwillow's Ruins, Reeksun Bloodcraver 's chest

name: Ruby Encrusted Gauntlets
description: These ruby-encrusted gauntlets shine with a feverish glow.
dropLocation: Plane of Night, Raid warded chest

name: Runic Gloves
description:
These gloves have small runes that glow when the wearer is holding an item that
has magical properties.
dropLocation: Necromancer's Doom, Chest behind locked door

name: Sage's Gloves (Level 17)
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .
dropLocation: The Thrill of the Hunt, End reward

name: Sage's Gloves (Level 26)
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .
dropLocation: The Thrill of the Hunt, End reward

name: Sanctified Gages
description:
Maldetto's former gloves have holes in the center of the palms that radiate
with Divine energy, a remnant of the sacrifice made to purge them of dark magic.
The blade may be gone, but its conviction endures.
dropLocation: The Mark of Death, Warded chest

name: Scuffed Long-Gloves
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Seven Fingered Gloves
description:
Plain white gloves of undistinguished make or material. But then there's that
whole 'seven fingers' thing...
dropLocation: The Titan Awakes, Raid Warded chest

name: Severlin's Iron Fists (level 10)
description: Respect the power and the might of the iron rule.
dropLocation: Anniversary Party, Turn in 20
